title: pelargonium × amoenum
intro: Pelargonium × amoenum, also known as Mountain Rose or Cape Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the genus Pelargonium, native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains geraniol, linalool, and borneol, among other compounds, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Pelargonium × amoenum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and even alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × amoenum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create a variety of products, such as skincare creams, perfumes, and medicinal remedies.
